title: Ubiquiti UVC-AI-Dome-W - AI Dome IP camera, 8MP, white
description: Outdoor 4K PoE Dome Camera with enhanced AI for person and license plate recognition, long-range IR night vision , and protection against harsh weather. The camera records 8 MP video (3840 x 2160) at 30 frames per second with a fixed 2.8mm lens 4K (8 MP) resolution Field of view - 109.9 ° horizontal , 134.1 ° diagonal, 56.7 ° vertical Built-in IR LEDs and automatic IR cut filter for better night vision (40m) Water resistance IP66 + IK10 vandal resistance Microphone (can be disabled) IK10 vandal-proof protection Micro SD (minimum 64 GB) Power via PoE (42.5-57V DC) Device Mounting accessories
